MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: Damon Carter; Deputies Gasper; Dept. 505
Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:24 a.m. and concluding at 9:52 a.m.

Plaintiff Tenth and Market, LLC appearing represented by Daniel Ishu, Esq., via Zoom Video Conference.
Witness for Plaintiff Pattie Quinsay appeared via zoom.
Defendants Andrew Toma and Philip Simone appeared in court.

Court is made aware of the unfiled motion to set aside default filed by the defendants on this case. The motion is awaiting e-filing.

The court finds the defendant's request to vacate default timely and the request is granted.

The court will prepare an order to vacate default.
